compiled_state.title: Ticket 207e-db42 has corrupt event log — missing CREATE event prevents transitions
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Ticket 207e-db42 exists (ticket show works, returns valid JSON with status=open) but all mutation commands (transition, comment) fail with 'Error: ticket 207e-db42 has no CREATE event'. The ticket's work is complete — CLAUDE.md was updated and committed. The ticket just can't be closed via the CLI.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Root cause hypothesis: reducer cache returns valid state but actual event files are missing from worktree.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation complete. Root cause: ticket-compact.sh (line 244-249) deletes ALL event files including CREATE during compaction. Mutation commands (ticket-comment.sh:54, ticket-transition.sh:89) require *-CREATE.json via find but don't accept *-SNAPSHOT.json as a valid alternative. Fix: update the CREATE-existence check in mutation commands to also accept SNAPSHOT files.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: mutation commands now accept SNAPSHOT files as valid ticket existence proof (fix was on main, merged in). Added regression test test_mutation_after_compact.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
